title: Rage Power
wikitext:
[[File:HULK - I'm Always Angry.gif|thumb|right|500px|[[Hulk (Marvel Cinematic Universe)|Bruce Banner]] can get stronger the angrier he is.]]



==Summary==
Ability to gain strength from anger.

The user becomes stronger, faster, more durable, etc. through anger, rage, hatred, and vengeance whether their own or others, possibly unlocking abilities related to the affinity and enhancing their existing powers. Some users may be able to draw sustenance from the anger or even slow or stop aging.

Note that for a character to qualify for this ability it should differ from what is possible for a typical human (i.e. not a normal reaction to adrenaline).

==Limitations==
* Application may be uncontrollable
* May be not possible to activate it at will
* May be limited by the amount of anger they can harness.
* May lose control when angered, causing harm to even allies.
* May snap out only by outside forces or lengthy periods of time in peaceful environments.
* May be difficult to snap out of rage-filled trance.

==Users==
*[[Yammy Llargo]] ([[Bleach]])
*Several characters, notably [[Son Gohan (Dragon Ball Z)|Gohan]] and [[Vegeta (DBS Anime)|Vegeta]] ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Aatrox]], [[Darius (League of Legends)|Darius]], [[Evelynn]], [[Gnar]], [[Rek'Sai]], [[Renekton]], [[Sion (League of Legends)|Sion]], and [[Tryndamere]] ([[League of Legends]])
*[[Hulk (Marvel Comics)|Bruce Banner]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Kratos]] ([[God of War]])
